title: Shareware Multiplayer
description: Enable multiplayer by disabling demo mode in 3d Shareware v1.34
body: multiplayer is difficult to achieve in 3d shareware v1.34, as the game is forced into demo mode. there is no button for the server screen, and one has to kick themselves from a local world in order to open it. additionally, demos expire after 5 in-game days, which is not enough to experience the joy of friendship. this mod fixes that, and gives the user a title screen with the same creature comforts as any boring release version, as well as giving worlds a meaningful persistence which can create memories that last a lifetime. i hope this description sells the mod enough to pass modrinth content rules, in reality it's just a single modifyarg that sets demo mode to false.
